items.title_en: 20,000 job cuts at Meta, Microsoft raise concern that AI-driven labor crisis is here
items.title_zh: Meta 裁员 20,000 人，微软担心人工智能驱动的劳工危机即将到来
items.desc_en: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.
items.desc_zh: Meta 表示将裁员 10%，与此同时，微软宣布将在其 51 年历史上首次提供员工买断计划。

items.title_en: Who is making decisions in Iran?
items.title_zh: 谁在伊朗做决定？

items.desc_zh: 伊朗新任最高领导人应该拥有最终决定权，但实际上情况要模糊得多。

items.title_en: ‘Simple math’: JPMorgan analyst makes the case for why oil prices should push even higher

items.desc_en: Oil inventories and demand destruction have not balanced the supply disruption from the Iran war, JPMorgan said. Prices need to rise to close the deficit.

items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
